sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى فِي الأُفُقِ الدَّوْلِيِّ مَلَامِحُ نِظَامٍ عَالَمِيٍّ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Na međunarodnom horizontu se naziru obrisi novog svjetskog poretka.
sentences.translationEn: The features of a new world order are emerging on the international horizon.

sentences.arabic: يَتَسِمُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ بِتَعَدُّدِ الأَقْطَابِ وَتَآكُلِ الهَيْمَنَةِ الأُحَادِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj sistem karakterizira multipolarnost i erozija unilateralne hegemonije.
sentences.translationEn: This system is characterized by multipolarity and the erosion of unilateral hegemony.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ سَادَتْ تِلْكَ الهَيْمَنَةُ لِعُقُودٍ طَوِيلَةٍ خَلَتْ.
sentences.translation: Ta hegemonija je vladala dugim decenijama koje su prošle.
sentences.translationEn: That hegemony prevailed for long decades past.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّحَوُّلُ الجِيُوسِيَاسِيُّ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ تَبَدُّلٍ فِي مَوَازِينِ القُوَى العَسْكَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova geopolitička transformacija nije puka promjena u vojnim odnosima snaga.
sentences.translationEn: This geopolitical transformation is not merely a change in military power balances.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ انْزِيَاحٌ عَمِيقٌ فِي مَرَاكِزِ الثِّقَلِ الاقْتِصَادِيِّ نَحْوَ الشَّرْقِ وَالجَنُوبِ العَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: To je duboki pomak ekonomskih centara gravitacije prema istoku i globalnom jugu.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it is a profound displacement of economic centers of gravity toward the East and the Global South.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الصُّعُودَ المُتَسَارِعَ لِقُوًى نَاشِئَةٍ فَرَضَ وَاقِعًا جَدِيدًا عَلَى السَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ubrzani uspon sila u nastajanju nametnuo je novu stvarnost na sceni.
sentences.translationEn: The rapid rise of emerging powers has imposed a new reality on the scene.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ هَذَا الوَاقِعُ إِعَادَةَ صِيَاغَةِ المَوَاثِيقِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ القَائِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova stvarnost zahtijeva preoblikovanje postojećih međunarodnih povelja.
sentences.translationEn: This reality necessitates the reshaping of existing international charters.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تَكُونَ هَذِهِ المَوَاثِيقُ أَكْثَرَ شُمُولِيَّةً لِلتَّنَوُّعِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove povelje moraju biti inkluzivnije u pogledu kulturne raznolikosti.
sentences.translationEn: These charters must be more inclusive of cultural diversity.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ تَعَاظُمِ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ العَابِرَةِ لِلْحُدُودِ، تَبْرُزُ مَخَاطِرُ جَدِيدَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Uz sve veće prekogranične izazove, pojavljuju se novi rizici.
sentences.translationEn: With the escalation of transboundary challenges, new risks are emerging.

sentences.arabic: تَعُدُّ الأَزَمَاتُ المُنَاخِيَّةُ وَالأَوْبِئَةُ مِنْ أَبْرَزِ هَذِهِ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Klimatske krize i epidemije su među najistaknutijim od ovih izazova.
sentences.translationEn: Climate crises and pandemics are among the most prominent of these challenges.

sentences.arabic: يُصْبِحُ التَّعَاوُنُ الدَّوْلِيُّ المَبْنِيُّ عَلَى الِاحْتِرَامِ ضَرُورَةً مُلِحَّةً.
sentences.translation: Međunarodna saradnja zasnovana na poštovanju postaje hitna potreba.
sentences.translationEn: International cooperation based on respect is becoming an urgent necessity.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَعُدْ هَذَا التَّعَاوُنُ مُجَرَّدَ تَرَفٍ دِبْلُومَاسِيٍّ لِلدُّوَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ova saradnja više nije samo diplomatski luksuz za države.
sentences.translationEn: This cooperation is no longer just a diplomatic luxury for nations.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّنَافُسَ المَحْمُومَ عَلَى المَوَارِدِ يَسْتَوْجِبُ إِيجَادَ آلِيَّاتٍ لِفَضِّ النِّزَاعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Grozničava konkurencija za resurse zahtijeva pronalaženje mehanizama za rješavanje sukoba.
sentences.translationEn: The feverish competition for resources requires finding mechanisms for conflict resolution.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تَتَجَاوَزَ هَذِهِ الآلِيَّاتُ المَنْطِقَ الصِّفْرِيَّ لِلْقُوَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi mehanizmi moraju prevazići logiku nulte sume moći.
sentences.translationEn: These mechanisms must transcend the zero-sum logic of power.

sentences.arabic: تَبْرُزُ هُنَا أَهَمِّيَّةُ الدُّوَلِ المُتَوَسِّطَةِ كَجُسُورٍ لِلتَّهْدِئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovdje se ističe važnost srednjih sila kao mostova za deeskalaciju.
sentences.translationEn: Here, the importance of middle powers as bridges for de-escalation emerges.

sentences.arabic: وَخِتَامًا، فَإِنَّ اسْتِقْرَارَ المَنْظُومَةِ العَالَمِيَّةِ يَرْهَنُ بِإِرَادَةِ الفَاعِلِينَ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, stabilnost globalnog sistema zavisi od volje aktera.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, the stability of the global system depends on the will of the actors.

sentences.arabic: يَنْبَغِي لِلْجَمِيعِ التَّخَلِّي عَنِ العَقْلِيَّةِ الصِّدَامِيَّةِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi bi trebali napustiti stari konfrontacijski mentalitet.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone should abandon the old confrontational mentality.

sentences.arabic: تَبَنِّي مَنْهَجٍ تَشَارُكِيٍّ هُوَ السَّبِيلُ لِلأَمْنِ وَالرَّخَاءِ الشَّامِلِ.
sentences.translation: Usvajanje participativnog pristupa je put ka sigurnosti i sveobuhvatnom prosperitetu.
sentences.translationEn: Adopting a participatory approach is the path to security and comprehensive prosperity.
